title: Simple optimization
description: An optimization modpack for the original Minecraft
body:
## Simple optimization
### This project will stop receiving updates. It is recommended to use [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)
This is a simple optimization package for Minecraft that improves the game's performance and experience by adding a large number of optimization mods.
Able to increase the frame rate of the game by almost 2x 😁 (this was tested on my old computer)
### Contrast
![Use this modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55f1891608bd3eafcddab3a512988f446b7f9609.png) </br>
![1.20.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bd72442839a6035df728855b5271829b9904d4c.png)
### Use Content
- 1.Fabric: A lightweight mod loader that provides the most basic optimization for the game
- 2.Sodium, lithium, indium: Optimization for Minecraft at the mod level
- 3.Minimalist mod count: Reduce the burden on your computer
### Mods
<details>
<summary>Mods List</summary>
  
  - 3D 皮肤层 (Skin Layers 3D)
  - 锂 (Lithium)
  - 模组菜单 (Mod Menu)
  - 钠 · 扩展 (Sodium-Extra)
  - 钠 (Sodium)
  - 苹果皮 (AppleSkin)
  - 铟 (Indium)
  - 玉 🔍 (Jade 🔍)
  - JEI物品管理器 (Just Enough Items)
  - Reese的钠视频界面 (Reese's Sodium Options)
  - Xaero的小地图 (Xaero's Minimap)
  - Fabric API
  - Forge Config API Port
  - Iris Shaders
</details>
